title: Building Responsive UI with Flexbox and Grid
description: Covers how Flexbox and CSS Grid help create responsive and adaptive layouts for modern web applications.
content: Flexbox and Grid are powerful CSS layout systems used in modern web design. Flexbox is ideal for one-dimensional layouts such as rows or columns, while Grid is better for two-dimensional layouts. Using Tailwind CSS utilities, developers can quickly implement responsive designs without writing custom CSS. These tools ensure consistent layouts across different screen sizes.
